Notice Of Motion Of Pltf'S Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Barnett, Esq., 415.729.5298, for plaintiff Western Gravel & Roofing Supply, Inc.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY, INC.'s Motion To Amend Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of amended judgment.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Paula Shi #13358.

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY, INC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BAY VIEW ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
At the request of counsel for Plaintiff DEFENDANT PETER HA, GUARANTOR is ordered dismissed without prejudice.
Eugene Lee sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $82,654.34
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $10,952.35
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $556.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $95,163.20
Judgment signed in open court.
